name: Mitek Identity Verification and Mobile Capture REST API
what_it_does: Mitek identity verification and mobile imaging REST API for banks, credit unions, fintechs, and financial services companies to capture, authenticate, and process identity documents, checks, and financial documents — enabling automated mobile check deposit, identity document verification, selfie biometrics, and intelligent document processing through Mitek's AI-powered mobile imaging and identity platform serving 99% of US mobile deposit market. Enables AI agents to manage mobile deposit for check capture and MICR processing automation, handle identity verification for document capture and authentication automation, access face match for selfie-to-ID biometric verification automation, retrieve document classification for financial document type recognition automation, manage check fraud for check image fraud detection automation, handle address verification for utility bill and bank statement extraction automation, access business verification for business document authentication automation, retrieve liveness detection for real person biometric verification automation, manage data extraction for document OCR and field capture automation, and integrate Mitek with mobile banking, lending origination, and compliance platforms for mobile financial identity automation.
use_cases: Enabling mobile check deposit capture and MICR processing for bank digital banking automation agents
Automating identity document verification for fintech account opening KYC compliance automation agents
Capturing and extracting data from financial documents for lending origination automation agents
Detecting check fraud through AI image analysis for bank risk management automation agents
not_for: Non-financial document capture (Mitek is specialized for financial and identity documents)
General OCR without financial context (Mitek is purpose-built for mobile financial imaging)
Physical branch document scanning (Mitek specializes in mobile/digital channel capture)
best_when: A bank, credit union, fintech, or financial services company wanting AI agents to enable mobile check deposit, automate identity document capture and verification, detect check fraud, and extract financial document data through Mitek's AI-powered mobile financial imaging platform.
avoid_when: MOBILE SDK IS THE PRIMARY CHANNEL: Mitek's strengths are in mobile SDK for guided image capture; automated server-side-only image submission assumption creates lower_accuracy versus guided mobile capture; automated should use Mitek Mobile SDKs for user-facing document capture. CHECK DEPOSIT REQUIRES BANK SPONSORSHIP: Remote check deposit (RDC) requires Federal Reserve bank participation and risk management; automated open-API-RDC assumption creates bank_not_participating for banks without Mitek RDC agreement; automated must establish Mitek RDC relationship through participating financial institution. IMAGE QUALITY IS EVERYTHING: Mitek's AI accuracy depends heavily on captured image quality; automated any-image-quality assumption creates extraction_error for poor mobile captures; automated must implement Mitek's image quality feedback for guided recapture. FRAUD DETECTION HAS FALSE POSITIVE RATE: Mitek check fraud models balance false positive and false negative rates; automated zero-false-positive assumption creates fraud_scoring_tradeoffs; automated must implement manual review for borderline fraud scores.

auth.notes: Mitek uses API key + OAuth2 for identity and imaging REST API. REST API with JSON. San Diego, CA HQ. Founded 1986. NASDAQ:MITK. Products: MiSnap (mobile capture SDK), Mobile Verify (identity), Mobile Deposit (check), MiPass (biometric), Mobile Fill (document extraction), Check Fraud Defender. SDKs: JS, iOS, Android. 99% US mobile deposit market. 7,500+ FI customers. Competes with IDEMIA and Onfido for identity verification.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved financial institution partners; production requires enterprise agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by transaction volume; module-based licensing; SDK licensing; support tiers
pricing.notes: San Diego CA. NASDAQ:MITK. Annual subscription. 7,500+ FIs. 99% US mobile deposit market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; image processing and check APIs throttled per customer tier

known_agent_gotchas: MISNAP SDK IMPROVES QUALITY: Mitek's MiSnap SDK provides guided capture with real-time quality feedback; automated raw camera capture assumption creates 30-50% lower accuracy versus guided MiSnap capture; automated should integrate MiSnap SDK for production identity and check capture

CHECK ROUTING NUMBER VALIDATION: MICR check processing requires valid routing and account numbers; automated unvalidated check submission assumption creates invalid_routing_number rejection; automated must validate check MICR format before submission to fraud and deposit APIs

FRAUD SCORE IS PROBABILISTIC: Mitek Check Fraud Defender returns probability scores, not binary decisions; automated binary-pass-fail assumption creates missed nuance in fraud risk; automated must implement score threshold decision logic appropriate for institution risk appetite

IDENTITY DOCUMENT CONFIDENCE SCORES: Mitek identity verification returns confidence scores per extracted field; automated uniform confidence assumption creates missed low-confidence field values; automated must validate confidence scores and flag low-confidence extractions for review

FRONT AND BACK REQUIRED: Most identity documents require both front and back capture for complete verification; automated front-only assumption creates incomplete_document_data; automated must guide users to capture both front and back of identity documents
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mobile financial imaging. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. API key + OAuth2. US/EU. Check, identity document, and biometric data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial imaging. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key + OAuth2. US/EU. Check and identity document data.
